# The JKD Legacy Academy

> Authentic Jeet Kune Do (JKD) — Bruce Lee's martial art and philosophy, taught in his direct lineage — in Melbourne (Maidstone, inner‑west) and Adelaide, Australia, under Sigung Ricardo Vargas. The Academy is a private‑membership Kwoon (school) for committed students, not a drop‑in gym; admission begins with a personal conversation.

## Key facts

- **Name:** The JKD Legacy Academy (also "JKD Legacy")
- **Discipline:** Jeet Kune Do (Jun Fan Gung Fu) — founded by Bruce Lee
- **Head instructor & founder:** Sigung Ricardo Vargas — a second‑generation JKD instructor certified by Sifu Jerry Poteet and Sigung Richard Bustillo, both direct students of Bruce Lee.
- **Headquarters:** Unit 6 / 72‑80 Hampstead Rd, Maidstone VIC 3012, Australia (inner‑west Melbourne, near Maribyrnong & Footscray).
- **Second location:** Adelaide Kwoon (South Australia) — the original Australian JKD Legacy school, established 2011 — led by Sifu Peter Pitrakkos.
- **Phone:** 0459 785 073 (Melbourne) · 0411 268 793 (Adelaide)
- **Email:** jkdaustralia@gmail.com
- **Languages:** English (primary), Spanish
- **Admission:** Private membership — submit an inquiry, then a personal call with leadership before stepping on the mat.

## Programs & pricing (AUD)

- **Foundation** — a 12‑week beginner program; no experience required.
- **Progression** and **Mastery** — continuing pathways for developing and advanced students.
- **3‑Month Unlimited membership:** A$650
- **Monthly Unlimited membership:** A$240
- **12‑Session Flexible pack:** A$350
- **5‑Session Flexible pack:** A$175
- A **free trial class** is available. Prices are in Australian dollars and non‑transferable; contact the Academy for family or private‑session rates.

## Instructors

- Sigung Ricardo Vargas — Head Instructor (Melbourne HQ)
- Sifu Peter Pitrakkos — Adelaide
- Sifu Thomas Pham — Saint Albans VIC 3021
- Sifu Paul Chiaravalle — Melbourne
- Sifu Mattia Riccardi — Templestowe VIC 3107
- Sifu Neko Tobías — Maidstone VIC 3012

## Pages

- [Home](https://jkdlegacy.com.au/): What Jeet Kune Do is, the lineage, and why train at JKD Legacy.
- [Legacy](https://jkdlegacy.com.au/legacy): The lineage from Bruce Lee to today's instructors.
- [The Way](https://jkdlegacy.com.au/the-way): Training pathways (Foundation, Progression, Mastery), schedule and membership pricing.
- [Join the Family](https://jkdlegacy.com.au/join-the-family): Locations, the instructor roster, and the inquiry form to start.
